sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67158" key="metewrosko/pion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετεωρο-σκόπιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n67158.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">an instrument for taking celestial observations</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg009:1:3:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3.4</biblScope> </bibl>; <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετεωρο-σκοπεῖον</orth>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:6:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
